title: Add connection-establishment timeout to McpServer::new (initialize handshake)
description: CC connectToServer (client.ts:1048-1077) races client.connect(transport) against getConnectionTimeoutMs() ms (default configurable via env). A non-responsive server causes the race to reject with a TelemetrySafeError. OC McpServer::new (src/mcp.rs:360-432) calls initialize() which calls transport.request('initialize', ...) with no timeout guard. A non-responsive MCP server hangs the async task indefinitely. Required: wrap the initialize() call (and the subsequent refresh_tools()) in tokio::time::timeout with a configurable deadline; surface McpError::Timeout on expiry.
